statement.en: Qualitative insight into uronylated human milk oligosaccharides and mucin derived non-invasively from the neonatal gut
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is observation-impossible in its current form. An embargoed thesis with no accessible abstract, methodology, data, or results cannot be evaluated for truth-value, validity, or contribution. The document exists formally but is epistemically empty relative to peer review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 母乳から腸へ流れる糖と粘液の対話が、非侵襲的に時間とともに積分される。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='30' r='8' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><ellipse cx='50' cy='60' rx='15' ry='20' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><path d='M 50 38 Q 48 48 50 60' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M 50 38 Q 52 48 50 60' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='35' y1='60' x2='25' y2='70' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='65' y1='60' x2='75' y2='70' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='50' y='90' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle' fill='#f59e0b'>non-invasive</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 乳房から腸への静かな分子の踊りが、外からは見えぬまま生命の根を育てている。
